chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Misc. Application No.S-37 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2025 Mr. Agha Ghulam Abbas, advocate for applicants. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, Deputy Prosecutor General Sindh. = After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for the Applicants does not press this application if an observation is given that the Applicants will challenge the medical certificate inferred by Judicial Magistrate-II, Umerkot, in his order dated 15.02.2025, before the medical board. Accordingly, Crl. Misc. Application stands dismissed with the observation that the Applicants shall, within one week, challenge the medical certificate issued by the Medical Officer, Umerkot, before the medical board who shall examine the matter according to law. After the conclusion of the medical board, the Judicial Magistrate will act in accordance with the law. JUDGE *Faisal*
